candidates.why: Top-line sales row; identical to Total Revenue in the preview and may be the primary reported sales label.
Canonical total revenue row; identical to Product sales in the preview and clearly matches REVT.
This is cost of revenue, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list because the company reports both 'Total Revenue' and 'Product sales' with identical values; later code can take the first available label.

candidates.why: Inventory asset, not an income statement cost flow.
Direct match for cost of sales / cost of revenues.

variables.notes: Selected the direct income statement cost-of-revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component, but appears only for recent period(s) and likely does not cover all years alone.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Candidate list appears incomplete for SG&A coverage. An explicit SG&A component exists ('Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses') but is mostly sparse in the preview, so per rule (b) I also included the closest broader overhead bucket 'Other Operating Expense' to cover earlier years. Manual review is needed because 'Other Operating Expense' may include some non-SG&A items and there are duplicate similarly named rows in the statement. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other Operating Expense
No dedicated research and development line is visible on the Income Statement.

candidates.why: Direct match for interest expense and reported across all years shown.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental component, not preferred when a main interest expense line exists.
Balancing/derived line; should not be preferred over the reported line.

variables.notes: Used the primary reported interest expense line only.

candidates.why: Income statement earnings from associates, not book equity.
Equity component, but not total book equity.
Equity component, but not total book equity.
Best match for parent/common shareholders' equity and excludes minority interests when a separate minority line exists.
This is minority/non-controlling interest, not parent book equity.
Includes minority interests here because a separate minority line exists; less preferred to avoid double counting with MIB.

variables.notes: Preferred parent/shareholders' equity because minority interests are separately reported.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income attribution, not minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest; subtotal before attribution.
